title: Plastic Glue 30g, Clear Superglue for Plastic, Instant Model Glue, for Miniatures, Model, PLA, 3D Printing, Acrylic, PVC, Waterproof, Heat-Resistant, with Anti-Clog Cap
features: Strong Plastic Glue: Our plastic glue clear have been tested to be super strong for all bonding processes that require a fast, strong bond, and their performance and ease of use make them ideal

Superglue for Plastic: Bondtech model glue is suitable for hard plastic, ABS, PLA, plexiglass, acrylic and more, with a wide range of material compatibility, is a good partner for every home, workshop, construction site and craft products, no longer need to worry about breakage

Precision Repair: Glue for plastic comes with three droppers with tiny nozzles for faster and easier precision application in small, hard-to-reach areas. (Tip: After using the droppers, it is recommended to slightly vibrate the bottle vertically to avoid clogging of the droppers with residual acrylic glue; in addition, the tips of the droppers can be cut as needed)
Anti-Clogging Design: The special cap design prevents the glue spout from sticking, prevents drying out, and is reusable. Strong glue for plastic can be used until the last drop and will not solidify
Heat Resistant & Waterproof: With a temperature resistance range of -40°C to +100°C, this plastic glue is waterproof, dishwasher safe, fast drying, UV resistant and shock resistant when cured

Easy to Use: Keep the repair surface clean and dry before use. After applying the plastic model glue, press and hold both repair surfaces for 45 seconds for initial curing. Wait 24 hours for optimum bonding

specifications_table.Compatible Material: ABS, Acrylic, Glass, Metal, PLA, Plastic, Polyvinyl Chloride, Stone, Wood
specifications_table.Other Special Features of the Product: Fast Curing, High Strength, Heat Resistant, Waterproof, Anti-Clog Design
